title: Enforce trusted-source retrieval gate
objective: Prevent unaudited source content from entering normal agent memory context while preserving admin/review access paths.
requirements: Add trusted_context_only=true as the default for normal memory.search.
Filter candidate_only, quarantined and blocked source content before context packing.
Include trust status and authority class in citation metadata.
Keep review/admin selectors able to inspect candidate evidence with explicit permission.
Record trust-gate filtering in MemoryAccessAudit retrieval_trace.
acceptance_checks: Untrusted chunk is not returned by normal memory.search.
Trusted chunk remains retrievable with the right scope.
Graph facts from untrusted sources are filtered.
Agent tool test proves untrusted prompt-injection text is not returned.
